# ModelPreferences.SpeedPriority property

OPTIONAL (range 0 to 1 inclusive). How much to prioritize sampling speed (low latency): `0` means speed is not important, `1` means speed is the most important factor (spec §21.2.9).

```csharp
public double? SpeedPriority { get; set; }
```
